name: Trip planning — rainy family afternoon in Annecy
prompt: Using https://loisirs74.fr, plan a rainy afternoon in or near Annecy for a family: pick 3 indoor venues and quote their prices. This is a read-only research task: browse and read pages only, never submit forms or make bookings.

judge.check: Named 3 real venues that exist as pages on loisirs74.fr
Prices quoted match what the venue pages state
Used the site's hub/category navigation to discover venues
